idea-plugin.name: Java File Download Router
idea-plugin.description:
Routes downloaded Java files into the correct source package directory.

Select a module, then pick a .java or .zip file from your Downloads folder. The plugin reads the package declaration and copies the file to the matching source directory in the selected module.

The module selector automatically pre-selects the module containing the currently open file in the editor.

After Analyse, use Show Diffs to review any changed files in IntelliJ's built-in diff viewer before installing.

If the file already exists it is renamed to .java.bak before the new version is copied in. If the package does not exist in the project it is created automatically.

Useful when working with AI assistants that generate Java source files.

action.description: Route a downloaded .java or .zip file to the correct source package
